current_export_tool_behavior: full_model modes ignore manifest items and use Stage2SemanticDataset validation split from checkpoint args; head_only mode can read manifest but is not full model output
exact_blocking_reasons: export_future_semantic_trace_state_20260427.py full_model modes build Stage2SemanticDataset from checkpoint args and do not consume external manifest items
external manifest has observed prompt and single future-frame candidates, but no per-horizon [H,K] visibility sequence
external candidates are not aligned to Stage2 model entity slots/fut_valid tensors
minimum_required_changes_for_true_extern: build Stage2-compatible batch/features from external manifest raw frames and masks
map external future candidates to semantic-state slots or add candidate-conditioned consumer head
create hardcase_event/candidate-aligned labels without Stage2 fut_valid
